arts.ttl: Celtic in seventh heaven as Hoops dominate 2025 PFA Scotland Team of the Year
arts.sum: So it’s no surprise to anyone that Scotland’s top-flight stars have voted seven Celtic players into the 2024/25 PFA Scotland Team of the Year. Seven Celtic stars make 2025 PFA Scotland Team of the Year

arts.ttl: Why will some other Premiership clubs want Celtic to win semi-final?
arts.sum: Fans of Hibs, Dundee Utd, St Mirren - and maybe even Aberdeen - will want Celtic to be in the Scottish Cup final. But why?

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers rules Hampden Park as dominant Celtic boss aims to further astonishing record
arts.sum: Celtic 1-0 Rangers (Scottish League Cup Semi-Final) Rodgers is set to manage his 28th game at Hampden Park as Celtic manager as the Northern Irishman looks to extend his unbelievable record at the national stadium.

arts.ttl: Maik Nawrocki's position in Celtic pecking order made crystal clear after Brendan Rodgers admission
arts.sum: Rodgers told reporters as part of an injury update ahead of the Scottish Cup semi-final against St Johnstone: “Dane Murray was someone I was looking at for the Rangers game and playing. Brendan Rodgers has dealt Maik Nawrocki a further blow after his recent comments about young Celtic centre-back Dane Murray.

arts.ttl: How has Louie Barry fared at Hull City after Celtic were looking to sign Aston Villa star
arts.sum: Louie Barry’s woes at Hull City after Celtic January transfer links with Aston Villa star There were also strong links to Barry, before he joined Championship side Hull City until the end of the campaign, but Celtic have got lucky here.

arts.ttl: PFA Scotland Premiership Team of the Year revealed, Celtic dominate
arts.sum: Celtic unsurprisingly dominate PFA Scotland Premiership Team of the Year.

arts.ttl: 'A bit of an early shout': Viljami Sinisalo details timeline of Celtic transfer
arts.sum: Viljami Sinisalo knew Celtic were potentially interested in his services before Finland's friendly with Scotland last June.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers in surprising Dane Murray Rangers admission
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers says Dane Murray was in contention to start Celtic's game against Rangers a few weeks ago.

arts.ttl: Dundee United 'stand firm' after Celtic raise concerns with SPFL
arts.sum: Dundee United are reportedly set to 'stand firm' in their desire to charge supporters £42 to attend next Saturday's game against Celtic at Tannadice.

arts.ttl: Why Simo Valakari is taking an alternative view to St Johnstone vs Celtic semi-final
arts.sum: St Johnstone boss Simo Valakari says his team's recent victory over Celtic stands them in good stead for this weekend's Scottish Cup semi-final.
